title: Conformer models and training datasets
content:
# Conformer models and training datasets

Authors: Axelrod, Simon, Gomez-Bombarelli, Rafael
Published: 2021-02-11T22:02:13Z
Subjects: Chemistry, Computer and Information Science
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/N4VLQL

Here you can find pre-trained machine learning models that generate predictions from conformer ensembles. You can also find the PyTorch datasets that were used to train them.

Citation: Axelrod, Simon; Gomez-Bombarelli, Rafael, 2021, "Conformer models and training datasets", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/N4VLQL, Harvard Dataverse, V3, UNF:6:8QjkuDIzvDUeu9ccbD20+A== [fileUNF]
